sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-05-27 06:34
- Distance: 7 km
- Moving time: 41:12
- Elapsed time: 41:44
- Elevation gain: 150.2 m
- Average heart rate: 165.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 182 bpm
- Average watts: 203.5 W
- Average speed: 10.2 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `167.5 bpm`, ranging from `154.1` to `173.9 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `161.6 bpm` and second-half average HR was `173.4 bpm` (+11.8 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `166.8 spm`, with a working range of `132.6` to `170.2 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `165.7 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `167.7 spm` (+2.0 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:52 /km` across `7.029 km` in `41:12` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:34 /km` and second-half pace was `6:09 /km` (+35 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `165.5 bpm` average and `182 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `158.4 bpm` in the first half and `171.4 bpm` in the second (+13.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `41:12` out of `41:44` elapsed (98.7%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `6` stop segments and `0.7%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `156.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.6 m` and `69.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `54.4 m` in the first half and `101.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
